properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: A cleansing fountain opened up In the house of David Where a mountain called Calvary became sacred There the blood of Jesus Poured out like wine And because He has redeemed us We lift the Savior high Singing

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Blessed be the Lamb Holy spotless Lamb Slain from the world's foundation For the sins of man Sacrifice of grace You are worthy of all praise Blessed be the Lamb Blessed be the Lamb

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: His hands of mercy bore the nails For redemption's sake And the curse He saw us under Caused His heart to break Love beyond all measure Saved us from the fall Now and forever We give Him glory for it all And we sing

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: In worship through the endless ages We will glorify Salvation's Lamb, our Savior Jesus Christ Forever magnified
